# atlassian_jira_screen (Resource)

Manages a Jira Cloud screen.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "atlassian_jira_screen" "example" {
  name = "Example Screen"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) The name of the screen.

### Optional

- `description` (String) The description of the screen.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of the screen.
